title: National Book Trust – Travel Desk Assistant – 1 Posts
shortInfo: National Book Trust Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Travel Desk Assistant. Candidates with any Bachelor's degree Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through National Book Trust official website.

basic_details.job_title: National Book Trust Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Book Trust Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Travel Desk Assistant. Candidates with any Bachelor's degree Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through National Book Trust official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university with good written and spoken communication skills in English and Hindi, Diploma/Certificate in Travel & Tourism / Hospitality / Office Administration (preferable), Minimum 3-4 years experience in travel desk operations

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for National Book Trust Travel Desk Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
